# Arlington Junk Removal — Complete Business Information

> Arlington Junk Removal is a locally owned and operated junk removal and hauling company based in Arlington, Texas, serving the DFW metroplex. We are licensed and insured, offer same-day service, and price by volume with no hidden fees.

## Contact Information

- Business Name: Arlington Junk Removal
- Phone: (817) 705-6612
- Email: info@arlingtonjunkremovaltx.com
- Website: https://arlingtonjunkremovaltx.com
- Hours: Monday through Saturday, 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM
- Location: Arlington, TX (Tarrant County)
- Service Radius: ~25 minutes from Arlington

## Service Areas

Arlington, TX (primary)
Grand Prairie, TX
Mansfield, TX
Fort Worth, TX (east and south)
Kennedale, TX
Pantego, TX
Dalworthington Gardens, TX
Hurst, TX
Euless, TX
Bedford, TX
Irving, TX

## Pricing (Volume-Based)

All pricing is based on how much space your items take in our trailer. No hourly rates. No hidden fees. Free on-site estimates.

- Quarter Load (approx 4 cubic yards): $150–$250 — A few small items, a couple pieces of furniture, some boxes, a mattress.
- Half Load (approx 8 cubic yards): $250–$400 — A room's worth of stuff. Our most common residential job size.
- Three-Quarter Load (approx 12 cubic yards): $400–$600 — Multiple rooms, a full garage cleanout, or a mix of furniture and debris.
- Full Load (approx 16 cubic yards): $600–$900 — A complete estate cleanout, whole-house declutter, or large construction debris haul.

Heavy items like concrete, dirt, or appliances may affect final pricing. Text a photo to (817) 705-6612 for a quick estimate.

## Services

### Residential Junk Removal
We remove furniture, appliances, mattresses, electronics, boxes, clothing, and general household clutter from homes in Arlington and surrounding cities. Perfect for decluttering, moving, downsizing, or just reclaiming your space. We handle all the lifting, loading, and disposal.

### Furniture & Appliance Removal
Couches, recliners, dining sets, bed frames, dressers, refrigerators, washers, dryers, ovens, dishwashers, water heaters, and more. We handle the heavy lifting and proper disposal or donation so you don't have to.

### Yard Waste Removal
Branches, brush, leaves, grass clippings, tree limbs, storm debris, dirt, rocks, and landscaping waste. We clear your yard fast and haul everything to proper disposal or composting facilities.

### Construction Debris Removal
Drywall, tile, lumber, carpet, concrete, scrap metal, roofing material, and remodel waste. We work with contractors and homeowners to keep job sites clean and projects on schedule. Licensed for construction waste hauling in Tarrant County.

### Estate Cleanouts
Compassionate, thorough estate and property cleanouts. We work with families, attorneys, and realtors to sort, donate, and remove belongings respectfully and efficiently. We understand these situations are difficult and we treat every job with care.

### Garage Cleanouts
Complete garage cleanout service. We remove old furniture, tools, boxes, sporting equipment, holiday decorations, and everything else that's accumulated. We sort, donate what we can, and leave your garage clean and usable.

### Commercial Junk Removal
Office cleanouts, retail fixture removal, warehouse clearance, and post-renovation commercial cleanup. We work around your business schedule to minimize disruption. Licensed and insured for commercial jobs. We handle offices, retail spaces, restaurants, and warehouses.

## How Our Process Works

1. Call, text, or book online — Reach out with a description or photo of what you need removed. We give a ballpark estimate right away. Call or text (817) 705-6612, or use the contact form on our website.

2. We show up and quote on-site — Our team arrives at your scheduled time, looks at everything in person, and gives you a final all-inclusive price. No hidden fees. You approve before we touch anything.

3. We haul it, sweep up, done — We load everything, clean up the area, and dispose of your junk responsibly. Usable items get donated to local Arlington charities. Recyclables go to recycling facilities. You get your space back.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does junk removal cost in Arlington, TX?
We price by volume — how much space your junk takes in our trailer. A quarter load starts at $150, and a full trailer load goes up to $900. We give free on-site estimates with no obligation. Text a photo to (817) 705-6612 for a quick ballpark.

### Do you offer same-day junk removal in Arlington?
Yes. We offer same-day and next-day service depending on availability. Call or text us early in the day for the best chance at same-day pickup. We know sometimes junk needs to go now, not next week.

### What items can you take?
Furniture, appliances, mattresses, electronics, yard waste, construction debris, exercise equipment, hot tubs, and general household junk. We cannot take hazardous materials like paint, chemicals, fuel, pressurized containers, or medical waste.

### What areas do you serve besides Arlington?
We serve Arlington, Grand Prairie, Mansfield, Kennedale, Pantego, Dalworthington Gardens, Fort Worth (east and south), Hurst, Euless, Bedford, and Irving. We cover most of the central DFW metroplex within a 25-minute radius of Arlington.

### Do I need to be home during junk removal?
We prefer someone to be present so we can confirm what goes and give you a final price. But we can do curbside or driveway pickup if everything is already set out. Just let us know when you schedule.

### Do you donate or recycle items?
Yes. We sort through items and donate usable furniture, clothing, and household goods to local Arlington charities and churches. Recyclable materials like metal, cardboard, and electronics are taken to appropriate recycling facilities. Our goal is to divert as much as possible from the landfill.

### Are you licensed and insured?
Yes. Arlington Junk Removal is a licensed and insured junk removal business operating in Tarrant County and the DFW metroplex. Your property is protected during every job.

### Do you handle construction debris?
Absolutely. We remove drywall, tile, lumber, carpet, concrete, scrap metal, and other remodel waste. We work with contractors and homeowners on renovation cleanups and job site debris removal.

### Is junk removal better than renting a dumpster?
For most residential jobs, yes. Junk removal is faster (same-day vs 3-7 day dumpster rental), requires no physical labor from you, and avoids HOA or city permit issues. Dumpster rental makes sense for large multi-day renovation projects. For one-time cleanouts, junk removal is almost always the better choice. Our pricing is competitive with dumpster rental costs when you factor in the labor savings.

### How quickly can you come out?
Same-day service is often available if you call before noon. Next-day is almost always available. For estate cleanouts and large commercial jobs, we can usually schedule within 2-3 days.

## Why Choose Arlington Junk Removal

- Locally Owned: We live and work in Arlington. Not a franchise. We know the area, the neighborhoods, and the best disposal options.
- Eco-Friendly Disposal: We donate usable items to local charities and recycle everything we can. Less landfill, more impact.
- Upfront Pricing: No hidden fees, no hourly rates, no surprises. We quote on-site and you approve before we touch anything.
- Licensed & Insured: Fully licensed business in Tarrant County. Your property is protected during every job.
- Same-Day Available: Call before noon, we can often be there the same day. No waiting around for a dumpster delivery.
- We Clean Up After: We don't just haul the junk. We sweep the area and leave it better than we found it.

## About the Business

Arlington Junk Removal was started to provide Arlington and the surrounding DFW communities with honest, affordable, and reliable junk removal service. We saw too many national franchises overcharging and providing impersonal service. As locals, we know Arlington — from the neighborhoods near AT&T Stadium and Globe Life Field to the residential areas of South Arlington, Mansfield, and Grand Prairie. We treat every customer's home with respect, price fairly, and do the job right the first time.

## Items We Accept

Furniture (couches, chairs, tables, desks, bed frames, dressers, shelves, entertainment centers), Appliances (refrigerators, washers, dryers, ovens, dishwashers, microwaves, water heaters, AC units), Mattresses and box springs, Electronics (TVs, monitors, computers, printers), Exercise equipment (treadmills, ellipticals, weight benches), Hot tubs and spas, Yard waste (branches, brush, leaves, dirt, rocks, mulch), Construction debris (drywall, tile, lumber, carpet, concrete, scrap metal, roofing), Boxes, bags, and general household clutter, Office furniture and equipment, Retail fixtures and displays

## Items We Cannot Accept

Hazardous materials, Paint and solvents, Chemicals and pesticides, Fuel and propane tanks, Pressurized containers, Medical waste, Asbestos-containing materials

## Local Disposal Information

- Arlington Landfill: 800 Secretary Drive, Arlington, TX 76015
- We handle all disposal logistics — customers never need to visit the dump
- Donation partners: Local Arlington churches and charity organizations
- Recycling: Metal, cardboard, and electronics recycled at appropriate facilities
